name: 385 Jane St (Upper Front)
why_strong: Walk to Jane subway (~350m) — single stop to Bloor West Village core. Heat/hydro/water included flat $100/mo. 2-bed with skylights and in-unit laundry, $2,650 is ~$200 under zone 2BR median.
why_weak: No parking; upper-floor walkup. 2BR only (no 1BR). Above ground-floor commercial-feel storefront strip.

name: 2010 Bloor St W
address: 2010 Bloor St W, Toronto, ON M6P 3K9
why_strong: ~150m walk to Runnymede subway — KILLER feature. Right on Bloor West Village retail strip (cafes, butchers, Pain Perdu). 1BR from $1,999 is rare for subway-adjacent stock in this zone.
why_weak: Older mid-rise (1960s); thin walls reputation. Bloor traffic noise on lower floors.

name: 70 High Park Avenue
address: 70 High Park Ave, Toronto, ON M6P 1A1
why_strong: ~200m walk to High Park subway AND ~250m to High Park east gate — best-of-both transit+park access in entire zone. 1BR floor $1,950 unusually competitive. Small 20-unit boutique building.
why_weak: No pets policy (NA for Fadi). High demand = often 0 availability — listed available March 2026 leased fast.

name: 17 Rowland St
why_strong: ALL utilities + WiFi included in $2,050 (water, hydro, gas, central AC). 750sqft 1BR top-floor of brick house with hardwood + high ceilings. 10min walk to High Park subway, 2min to bus. Available July 1 2026 — exact fit.
why_weak: No pets (asthma in house — not relevant for Fadi). No on-site parking (street permit). House conversion = potential noise from downstairs.

name: 60 Mountview Ave
why_strong: Best value-play in zone: $1,850 Junior 1BR with UTILITIES INCLUDED, ~300m to High Park subway. Beaux Properties = solid mid-tier landlord. Transit 10/10. ~14% under High Park 1BR median.
why_weak: Small at 515sqft. Older building. 'Junior' = compact layout, no separate den.

name: 8 Castleton Avenue
why_strong: TWO MONTHS FREE current promo. Excellent 1BR+2BR pricing for in-unit laundry+AC+stone counters. 5min bus to Runnymede subway. Heat/water included.
why_weak: Subway-distant (~1.4km to Runnymede; relies on bus). Syme is industrial-edge, less amenity-walkable than Bloor West. Parking $125/mo extra.

name: 65 Windermere Ave (Greenwin)
why_strong: CHEAPEST verified 1BR in zone — $1,549 studio / $1,625 1BR with 2 MONTHS FREE Greenwin promo. CRB-certified, heat+hot water included, ~500m to Jane subway AND ~600m to Humber Bay waterfront trail.
why_weak: 1960s parquet/tile — basic finishes, not renovated. Quiet Swansea = limited nightlife (3/10). Smaller units.

name: 150 Fermanagh Ave (Akelius)
why_strong: Roncesvalles heart — best walkable cafe/restaurant density in zone. $2,700 2BR/881sqft with in-unit W/D + utilities included is excellent. 13min downtown drive (closest to King W of any Wave G entry). Akelius mid-tier reliable.
why_weak: ~900m to Dundas West subway (BD/streetcar combo); slower commute than core High Park. Parking $175/mo. No 1BR currently.

name: The Spoke (485 Perth Ave)
why_strong: BRAND NEW 2025 building — Zumper 9.7/10. UP TO 2 MONTHS FREE. Resort-style amenities (pool, cold plunge, sauna, theatre, co-work). ~600m to Lansdowne subway, ~800m to Dundas West. Highest singles density (52%) in zone — Junction Triangle is young.
why_weak: Junction Triangle is railway-edge, light-industrial transitioning; walkability score modest. Premium finish = premium rent. Furthest CVH drive (33min).

name: 326 High Park Avenue
address: 326 High Park Ave, Toronto, ON M6P 2S7
why_strong: July 1 2026 availability confirmed — 3BR at $3,645 (will likely also have 1/2BR turnover). High Park Ave corridor = tree-lined, ~400m to Keele subway. Quiet residential street.
why_weak: Only 3BR listing surfaced — 1BR/2BR availability TBD. ~600m to High Park subway (not the closest).

name: 80 Quebec Avenue (condo rentals)
why_strong: STEPS to High Park subway (~250m). Condo amenities: tennis courts, outdoor pool, gym, sauna. Quoted 2BR includes all utilities + internet + parking + locker — apples-to-apples value better than headline $4,000.
why_weak: Headline rent very high ($4,000 2BR). Condo board rules — verify pets/lease terms. Only intermittent rental availability (condo bylaw decides).

name: 99 Roncesvalles Ave (above retail)
why_strong: Roncesvalles main strip — pure walkability. 8min downtown drive (best in zone). 3BR currently listed; smaller units rotate. Highest singles density area.
why_weak: No subway directly — 504 King streetcar 200m, BD subway ~1km (Dundas West). Currently only 3BR listed; need to monitor for 1BR/2BR. Strip-retail building = potential street noise.

name: Grenadier Square (40 High Park Ave)
address: 40 High Park Ave, Toronto, ON M6P 2S1
why_strong: ZUMPER 9.4/10 RATING. ~150m to High Park subway, ~200m to High Park east gate. Hotel-grade amenities: pool, gym, residents lounge, dog park, BBQ patio, music room. CURRENT PROMO: ONE MONTH FREE. GWL Realty = blue-chip landlord.
why_weak: 1BR base size only 502sqft — compact. Demand strong = limited unit choice. Garage parking extra.

name: Heintzman Place (60 Heintzman St)
why_strong: 16-storey Junction landmark on historic Heintzman Piano site. 327 units = consistent rental turnover. 1BR $2,100 furnished with parking + locker. ~700m to Keele subway, ~600m to Junction core (Dundas/Keele). Yoga room, gym, library, kids play, hobby room.
why_weak: Subway not at door (~700m walk). Some units back onto rail corridor — verify quiet side. Condo board rules per unit.

name: The Campbell (299 Campbell Ave)
why_strong: ~250m to Dundas West subway (BD line) + UP Express to Pearson — best multi-modal in entire zone. Toronto Public Library on ground floor of building. Purpose-built modern rental. 1BR from $2,025.
why_weak: Junction Triangle = railway-edge industrial transitioning. CVH drive 32min (one of furthest). Lower walkability score (30) — needs streetcar/subway to reach Roncey/Bloor West shops.

name: 118 Roncesvalles Avenue
why_strong: $1,600 1BR ON RONCESVALLES STRIP — best value-play in Roncey. 9min downtown drive. Walk to everything Roncey (Cherry Bomb Coffee, Barque, Hopgood's).
why_weak: Older building, basic finishes. No subway (streetcar 504 only). Small units.

name: Maya Mews (470 Roncesvalles Ave)
why_strong: $1,599 1BR — TIED FOR LOWEST in entire zone. South Roncesvalles, ~400m to Martin Goodman Trail (only year-round trail in west GTA — winter running solved). 7min downtown drive (best of any Wave G entry).
why_weak: No subway (Queen streetcar). Older building. Far south end of Roncey = quieter (good for sleep, less for nightlife).

name: 7 High Park Boulevard
address: 7 High Park Blvd, Toronto, ON M6R 1L9
why_strong: $1,625 1BR — direct south-gate entry to High Park (~300m), no road crossing. Steps to Roncesvalles strip AND Sunnyside/Martin Goodman trail. 8min downtown.
why_weak: East-Roncey/Parkdale edge — more variable street quality vs core Roncey. No subway (Queen streetcar + walk to Dundas West).

name: Old Mill Station (2675 Bloor St W)
address: 2675 Bloor St W, Toronto, ON M8X 1A4
why_strong: DIRECTLY ACROSS from Old Mill subway (~24m) — westernmost BD station, expressway-fast to CVH via Bloor → 427. 800sqft renovated 1BR with hardwood, garage parking included. 14-unit boutique = quiet. Humber River trail 200m for runs.
why_weak: No pets (NA for Fadi). Kingsway South is sleepy old-money — singles density low (30%), nightlife essentially nil. $2,290 not cheap for what is essentially a renovated mid-century walk-up.

name: One Old Mill (Tridel)
address: 1 Old Mill Dr, Toronto, ON M8X 0A5
why_strong: Tridel 2014 build — best-finish condo in Old Mill cluster. ~77m to Old Mill subway. Full hotel-style amenities: concierge, gym, pool, party room, yoga studio. 9' ceilings, in-suite laundry. Humber River trail 250m.
why_weak: Condo board pet/lease rules vary by unit owner. $2,400+ 1BR premium for non-purpose-built (individual condo landlords = inconsistent quality). Old Mill area quiet/older demographic.
